requiredEvidence.evidence: The independent repository contains the Tools package, its release infrastructure, and a fresh lockfile.

The independent repository passed typecheck, 28 files / 278 tests, reproducible build, 24/24 upstream completeness, source/packed 344/344, packed install, 14-Tool Pi activation and supply-chain verification for pi-leetcode-tools@0.1.2.

GitHub Actions push run 29678152949 and pull-request run 29678164885 passed the complete release pipeline for record 14c0f71a... on Windows and Ubuntu with Node 22.19.0 and Node 24 after the closed-registry release-harness fix.

Record 14c0f71a... preserves the exact tgz SHA-256, unpacked package digest and contract tuple validated by record 9e15d4af.... The byte-identical package passed public reads 6/6, Global full-safe 19 passed / 0 failed / 0 blocked / 7 skipped, and CN full-safe 21 passed / 0 failed / 0 blocked / 5 skipped; only the non-packed closed-registry release harness and its regression coverage changed.

The separately authorized CN interactive Pi UI flow passed 8/8 with lc_run Accepted, operation recovery Accepted, revision-bound Notes write, and lc_submit Accepted. The preserved evidence stores only hashes, byte counts and normalized states and remains package-artifact evidence for the unchanged tgz SHA-256 8f8cf6d3..., unpacked digest and contract tuple carried by record 14c0f71a....

invalidationConditions: the independent package-lock, source closure, release scripts or packed files change
the contract tuple, upstream mapping or exact artifact bytes change
